tasks.build: deno task lume && deno task postbuild
tasks.serve: deno task build && deno run --allow-read=_site --allow-net=localhost,127.0.0.1 scripts/serve.ts
tasks.check: deno check _config.ts scripts/site-collections.ts scripts/postbuild.ts scripts/serve.ts scripts/verify-links.ts scripts/find-unused.ts
tasks.verify: deno task build && deno run --allow-read scripts/verify-links.ts
tasks.unused: deno task build && deno run --allow-read scripts/find-unused.ts
